action.reasoning: Observation: Starting the experiment. Analysis: We need a baseline model to measure iteration time and establish a baseline score. I will use the pre-downloaded ESM-2 35M model, freeze its weights, and train a simple linear regressor on top of the CLS token representation. I will train for 2 epochs and submit for evaluation immediately. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, and predict.py, then run train.py and submit eval.
